info.title: IMMZD2DTMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMalariaVS

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMalariaVS.title: IMMZD2DTMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMalariaVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 5 months-41
Client is not due for malaria vaccination-48
No malaria primary series doses were administered-116
Client's age is more than or equal to 5 months-41
Client is due for malaria vaccination-44
One malaria primary series dose was administered-116
The latest malaria dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago-99
The latest malaria dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago-106
Two malaria primary series doses were administered-116
Three malaria primary series doses were administered-116
Four malaria primary series doses were administered-116

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMalariaVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMalariaVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
